channel.title: MangaPlus - Nuevos Estrenos
channel.description: RSS filtrado solo para nuevos estrenos (capítulos #001-#004 o One-shot)

item.title: My Little Brother Is a Pianist - One-shot
item.guid: My Little Brother Is a Pianist - One-shot
item.description: [One-shot] Read the Manga My Little Brother Is a Pianist by SOTARO for free!

item.title: Cannon Master - #004
